title: Esselte A4 Lever Arch File, Black, 72 mm Spine, Plastic, Vivida Range, 811370, 500 Sheets Capacity
features: High quality lever arch file with strong No.1 mechanism, striking Vivida colours, holds 500 sheets (80 gsm paper), ideal for home or office use

Patented No.1 mechanism with outstanding locking force, perfect alignment of pins even when the file is full, rado slots to secure the file when closed and upright, reinforced metal edge for stable storage

Durable scratch resistent PP cover in fresh colours with an embossed texture, spine pocket allows easy replacement of labels - additional labels can be printed using the EasyPrint custom label template available on the Esselte website
Made from recycled cardboard, FSC certified, 3 year guarantee on the mechanism
Content: Esselte lever arch file, black, 811370, single product dimensions: W x H x D: 72 x 318 x 288 mm, 450 g, for standard two hole punching
